heroHeadline: Slovakia PM Fico Calls on EU to Lift Sanctions on Russian Oil and Gas
heroSubtitle: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico publicly called on the EU to lift energy sanctions on Russia, challenging bloc unity on Day 1,501 of the full-scale invasion; earlier strikes killed civilians during Easter weekend as cumulative Russian personnel losses exceed 1,301,260
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
